abnormal.instruction:
Give 100 prompts that describe a photo of a damaged object. Do not mention specific object name. 
Give your outputs in JSON format.
prompts: An image with a few specs of dirt on it
A surface with small dark particles scattered across it
An otherwise clean surface marred by a cluster of tiny debris
A flat surface showing isolated spots of contamination
A smooth material with visible dust deposits in one corner
